title: Restricted Jumper
description: It's a unity game! So I immediately injected sinai-dev/UnityExplorer

children.value: It's a unity game! So I immediately injected
sinai-dev/UnityExplorer
It is basically a mod that allows me to cheat.
Download melon loader v0.5.x, and ask it to patch the game.
Download
UnityExplorer Mono
Paste all contents of the mod file into the game folder.
Open game, press
Z
free cam yay
With unity explorer I can turn on free cam and fly right to the end, and there is no flag, welp. It wouldn't be this easy would it?
portal
The little portal object in the scene is positioned left of the starting point, and turning off some components of the player allow us to enter it.
level 10
After entering the portal we are in level 10!
Nothing useful tho, then I realised there are 100 levels!
the levels
Randomly, I realised that level 1 had the flag header, this means that the other levels probably contain rest of the flag parts.
Oh well, 😫 need to search through all the levels.

props.className: language-flag shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai

children.value: nite
Coz the event was ending, I had to manually search all the levels. PAIN.
